title: Penguin (Mob Vote 2023)
description: This texture pack changes dolphins to the penguin from the Minecraft Mob Vote 2023.
body:
![PENGUIN](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/L5M5ZOx7/images/6bca3b96d6b6fb26fc8105a690eab29c3268523a.png)


Vote for the penguin !

This texture pack changes dolphins to the penguin from the Minecraft Mob Vote 2023.

Optifine/EMF mod required.
